retrieved_result: Daffodils "Daffodils A welcome sign that Spring is here, daffodils are surely one of the world's most popular flowers. Who could fail to be cheered up by their gorgeous colours and nodding heads? We've brought together all our daffodil activities on this page so that children can enjoy them too! ""I wandered
Decision_Reason: The retrieved result is about daffodils and children's activities; it does not relate to easy DIY room decoration ideas.

history.title: Daffodils
history.description: "Daffodils A welcome sign that Spring is here, daffodils are surely one of the world's most popular flowers. Who could fail to be cheered up by their gorgeous colours and nodding heads? We've brought together all our daffodil activities on this page so that children can enjoy them too! ""I wandered
